strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure—exceeds minimum requirement
Proven technical leadership across multiple Staff/Senior roles, plus founder of successful open-source geospatial platform with active users
Full-stack builder with hands-on design and coding fluency across numerous languages and technologies including cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML strategy or product development—recent work involves AI infrastructure (MCP) but lacks evidence of strategic AI vision or ML systems architecture
No clear experience with cloud platform strategy or advising customers on cloud adoption—cloud exposure is limited to infrastructure tooling, not product strategy
Lacks formal AI qualifications (Master's/PhD) and no recognized thought leadership in AI—most public talks focus on testing, web internals, and geospatial domains rather than AI
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly accomplished engineer who comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong technical leadership, full-stack building capabilities, and entrepreneurial experience. However, the role is explicitly specialized in AI Strategy, requiring recognized expertise in identifying strategic AI opportunities, designing cloud-AI product futures, and advising on cutting-edge adoption. The resume shows recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP tooling) but lacks demonstrated deep expertise in AI/ML systems, strategy, or products—preferential qualifications the role emphasizes. He has the engineering foundation and learning ability to grow into this position, but the specialization gap is notable for a Principal-level strategic role.
